name: s7g-a2a-bridge
description: S7G A2A Cross-Vendor Bridge — translates standard A2A HTTP requests to Iroh QUIC for P2P agent-to-agent communication

skills.name: Delegate Task
skills.description: Send an A2A JSON-RPC task to another agent via Iroh QUIC, returns streaming or completed result

skills.name: Discover Agents
skills.description: Query the DHT/Iroh mesh for agents advertising a specific skill, return matching agent cards

skills.name: Publish Agent Card
skills.description: Publish or update an agent card to the DHT for skill-based discovery by other agents
